configurePresets.name: default
configurePresets.description: Auto-detect all dependencies from the environment

configurePresets.name: macos-homebrew
configurePresets.description: Point detection at Homebrew's LLVM, since Apple's system clang lacks the libraries ICG needs

configurePresets.name: rhel
configurePresets.description: Same detection as default; installs to lib64 automatically per config_Linux.mk's /etc/redhat-release check
